---
title: "astro"
listing: 
  contents: photography/astro 
feed: 
  title: thhaase-astrophotography
format:
  html: 
    page-layout: custom
---
::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-3}
[box]{.center-text}
:::

::: {.g-col-3}
[box]{.center-text}
:::

::: {.g-col-3}
[box]{.center-text}
:::

::: {.g-col}
[box]{.center-text}
:::

:::
